caption: A man is seated in a podcast studio, wearing a black t-shirt that says "CHECK IT" and "MAN," a black baseball cap, and over-ear headphones. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone on a boom arm. In the background, white banners feature gold stars and the repeated phrase "GRIND HUSTLE," while a red logo for "BOSS TALK 101" is visible on the wall. Two graphic overlays appear on the screen: one on the left for "THE STUDIO PODCAST" and one on the right for "BOSS TALK 101." Across the sequence, the man begins by adjusting his headphones with both hands. He then lowers his arms and looks toward someone off-camera to his right, speaking while maintaining a focused expression. His posture shifts slightly as he engages in conversation, while the studio environment and on-screen graphics remain static.
